prompt:
Create a high-quality, studio-style split portrait composition with two stacked sections (top and bottom).
Layout:
Vertical split (top half + bottom half)
Clean, minimal aesthetic
No text, no watermark, no overlay
Subtle grain or dust texture on background
Soft, cinematic lighting

TOP SECTION:
Use [REFERENCE IMAGE 1 – FACE ONLY]
Replace only the face, keep original pose and expression (wide smile, joyful, slightly playful)
Short messy hair look
Outfit: black blazer over a casual inner shirt
Neutral grey studio background
Natural skin tones, realistic blending

BOTTOM SECTION:
Use [REFERENCE IMAGE 2 – FACE ONLY]
Replace only the face, keep original pose (hand on cheek, looking sideways, thoughtful expression)
Long, soft styled hair
Outfit: elegant black blazer with subtle details (bow or ribbon)
Same neutral grey studio background
Maintain soft feminine lighting
Important:
Face swap must look natural and seamless
Match lighting, skin tone, and color grading across both sections
Keep original body, pose, and composition unchanged
High realism, sharp focus, premium editorial photography style
Style keywords: ultra realistic, studio portrait, soft lighting, editorial fashion, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, cinematic tone, high detail
